message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "Member" as Member
participant ":TicketDetailPage" as TicketDetailPage
participant ":TicketDetailContainer" as TicketDetailContainer
participant ":AttendanceService (Frontend)" as AttendanceServiceFE
participant ":Router" as Router
participant ":AttendanceHTTPTransport" as AttendanceHTTPTransport
participant ":AttendanceEndpoint" as AttendanceEndpoint
participant ":AttendanceService" as AttendanceServiceBE
participant ":RequesterService" as RequesterService
participant ":AttendanceCommand" as AttendanceCommand
participant ":AttendanceQuery" as AttendanceQuery

Member -> TicketDetailPage: Click "Yes" Button
TicketDetailPage -> TicketDetailContainer: handleConfirmationInput()
TicketDetailContainer -> AttendanceServiceFE: confirmAttendance(classId, payload)
AttendanceServiceFE -> Router: route("PATCH", "/v2/class/{class_id}/attendance/confirmation")
Router -> AttendanceHTTPTransport: Confirmation(AttendanceService, [IServerOption])
AttendanceHTTPTransport -> AttendanceEndpoint: Confirmation(AttendanceService)
AttendanceEndpoint -> AttendanceServiceBE: Confirmation(context, payload)
activate AttendanceServiceBE
AttendanceServiceBE -> AttendanceServiceBE: Validate()
alt "Data Valid"
    AttendanceServiceBE -> AttendanceQuery: GetPureModel(context, [ISliceCondition])
    activate AttendanceQuery
    AttendanceQuery --> AttendanceServiceBE: ticket
    deactivate AttendanceQuery
    alt "Ticket Status is Accepted"
        AttendanceServiceBE -> RequesterService: Register(context, [Ipayload])
        activate RequesterService
        RequesterService --> AttendanceServiceBE: UpdateRequestStatus(context, ticket)
        deactivate RequesterService
        RequesterService --> AttendanceServiceBE: is updated
    end
    AttendanceServiceBE --> AttendanceEndpoint: is updated
    AttendanceServiceBE --> AttendanceEndpoint: response := Response(is updated, nil)
    deactivate AttendanceServiceBE
else
    AttendanceServiceBE --> AttendanceEndpoint: UnprocessableEntity
    deactivate AttendanceServiceBE
end
AttendanceEndpoint --> AttendanceHTTPTransport: response
AttendanceHTTPTransport --> Router: response
Router --> AttendanceServiceFE: response
AttendanceServiceFE --> TicketDetailContainer: response
TicketDetailContainer --> TicketDetailPage: response
TicketDetailPage --> Member: response
@enduml
```
